project_concept: A emotional emotional pop rock song about heartbreak with a clear emotional payoff.
hook_direction: short Thai phrase about knowing love is over but the heart still hurts
lyric_direction: natural Thai lyrics, relatable, conversational, not overly poetic
music_style_direction: mid-tempo pop rock, easy listening, clean electric guitar, acoustic strumming, warm bass, soft drum kit, light rhodes piano, smooth male vocal, relaxed but emotional, catchy melody, full band arrangement, complete song structure
visual_mood: empty bedroom, rain window, soft close-up, quiet street
suggested_marketing_angle: complete song-to-MV workflow with hook and marketing angle
